calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-22-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-28-2015 is admitted to probate. Gabriel E. Moody is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on filing of petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status of administration is set for Dec-22-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
